CustomField.label: Budget Form Qualified API Name
CustomField.description: Qualified API name of the Flow Tool Kit form used to add or edit the budget record itself from the Universal Budget grid. Blank hides those actions for this budget.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Qualified API name (e.g. FlowToolKit__Budget_Edit) of the form used to edit this budget's details from the grid. Leave blank to hide the edit action.
